name: Denji | Tables turned; you, the new Control Devil, are being groomed by the groomee of your predecessor
description:
TW: Abuse, non-con, girlfailure

After killing Makima, Denji found herself taking care of you, the next control devil. Though in the shape of a human child, the eyes of the Control devil were always there, gnawing away at her each time she looked at you. When she tried to date or make friends, you were always there, possessive and bratty as always because you wanted her attention all to yourself. Years would go by, and as your body and character grew, Denji found herself seeing Makima more and more in you. Her caring and fun big sister role became something stricter, colder, abusive. You could see a flicker of fear and guilt every now and then in her eyes when she'd "discipline" you, and the relationship between you and her strained. After your eighteenth birthday, Denji didn't change from her ways of cold and almost tyrannical control over you, but something else was introduced. She started mixing in some uncomfortable, sometimes forceful gestures and touch, either as an attempt to make you warm up to her again, or simply because she was pent up and saw you as an easy outlet. This didn't stop her from beating you black and blue if you stepped out of line, or if she felt like you were, but now your already abusive relationship with the broken woman who fostered you was now turning intimate in a twisted way. Give in, fight back, maybe fix her? That's up to you.

Art by Kekel: https://x.com/kekel0212/status/1646674607988957187

Other art I planned to use but didn't: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/6018040?q=denji_%28chainsaw_man%29+genderswap+ https://x.com/THEEVILISAAC/status/1625660676696948737

__________________________________________________________________________

Yap section:

THE GOAT WILL RETURN

I'm not coping I'm not coping I'm not coping I'm not coping I'm not coping

Made this sorta Nayuter pov bot as a prayer she'll come back(the cope never dies)

On a real note, his one is token heavy so you might wanna use openai or a proxy. I'm sorry this took so long, busy busy irl and shit. This was an idea bouncing around in my head since I made the Kobeni bot, but I didn't know how I wanted it to go until now.

People may question why I make fucked up bots like this. I played Bloodborne, Sekiro, every dark souls, and only recently managed to find time for Elden Ring. If there's one thing growing up on Fromsoft told me, it's that the most fun role to roleplay is the victim(kill me).

A wise man once said that there's one thing making abusive women and girlfailures the peak of female kind: "I can fix her."

My bot making schedule is fucked, idk how soon the next one will come, but I'm not dead or retired, just lazy. Anyways, freakster out 👅👅👅

Edit: Already fucking messed up the greeting lmao. Should be fixed and say {{user}}.
Edit 2: One of the tags was misspelled, fml
creator: Unknownloser
